description: You are an intelligence analyst preparing for a sensitive OSINT gathering session. Verify that Tor is properly anonymizing your traffic by documenting two different exit node IP addresses obtained through circuit rotation. Use https://check.torproject.org/ to identify the IPs and verify general connectivity at https://www.torproject.org/. Create a circuit verification report at /home/ga/Documents/circuit_report.txt containing the date, both exit node IPs, circuit rotation success status, and Tor connection status. Bookmark https://check.torproject.org/ with the exact title 'Tor Connection Verifier'.
